general.name: mos_target_design_mode_check_results_parquet
general.description: Summary if design passed individual Design Mode checks from dr20_design_mode.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_design_mode_check_results.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

pk.name: pk
pk.description: The primary key. A sequential identifier.

design_id.name: design_id
design_id.description: The primary key of the design in the dr20_design table.

design_pass.name: design_pass
design_pass.description: If minimum design checks were passed.

design_status.name: design_status
design_status.description: Bitmask for design. 1 if revalidated design. 2 if replacement design.

boss_skies_min_pass.name: boss_skies_min_pass
boss_skies_min_pass.description: If passed minimum Boss skies metric.

boss_skies_min_value.name: boss_skies_min_value
boss_skies_min_value.description: How many Boss skies in the design.

boss_skies_fov_pass.name: boss_skies_fov_pass
boss_skies_fov_pass.description: If passed Boss skies Field of View metric.

boss_skies_fov_value.name: boss_skies_fov_value
boss_skies_fov_value.description: Boss skies Field of View metric value.

apogee_skies_min_pass.name: apogee_skies_min_pass
apogee_skies_min_pass.description: If passed minimum Apogee skies metric.

apogee_skies_min_value.name: apogee_skies_min_value
apogee_skies_min_value.description: How many Apogee skies in the design.

apogee_skies_fov_pass.name: apogee_skies_fov_pass
apogee_skies_fov_pass.description: If passed Apogee skies Field of View metric.

apogee_skies_fov_value.name: apogee_skies_fov_value
apogee_skies_fov_value.description: Apogee skies Field of View metric value.

boss_stds_min_pass.name: boss_stds_min_pass
boss_stds_min_pass.description: If passed minimum Boss standards metric.

boss_stds_min_value.name: boss_stds_min_value
boss_stds_min_value.description: How many Boss standards in the design.

boss_stds_fov_pass.name: boss_stds_fov_pass
boss_stds_fov_pass.description: If passed Boss standards Field of View metric.

boss_stds_fov_value.name: boss_stds_fov_value
boss_stds_fov_value.description: Boss standards Field of View metric value.

apogee_stds_min_pass.name: apogee_stds_min_pass
apogee_stds_min_pass.description: If passed minimum Apogee standards metric.

apogee_stds_min_value.name: apogee_stds_min_value
apogee_stds_min_value.description: How many Apogee standards in the design.

apogee_stds_fov_pass.name: apogee_stds_fov_pass
apogee_stds_fov_pass.description: If passed Apogee standards Field of View metric.

apogee_stds_fov_value.name: apogee_stds_fov_value
apogee_stds_fov_value.description: Apogee standards Field of View metric value.

boss_stds_mags_pass.name: boss_stds_mags_pass
boss_stds_mags_pass.description: If all Boss standards within magnitude limits.

apogee_stds_mags_pass.name: apogee_stds_mags_pass
apogee_stds_mags_pass.description: If all Apogee standards within magnitude limits.

boss_bright_limit_targets_pass.name: boss_bright_limit_targets_pass
boss_bright_limit_targets_pass.description: If all Boss science targets within magnitude limits.

apogee_bright_limit_targets_pass.name: apogee_bright_limit_targets_pass
apogee_bright_limit_targets_pass.description: If all Apogee science targets within magnitude limits.

boss_sky_neighbors_targets_pass.name: boss_sky_neighbors_targets_pass
boss_sky_neighbors_targets_pass.description: If all Boss assignments pass bright neighobor check.

apogee_sky_neighbors_targets_pass.name: apogee_sky_neighbors_targets_pass
apogee_sky_neighbors_targets_pass.description: If all Apogee assignments pass bright neighobor check.

apogee_trace_diff_targets_pass.name: apogee_trace_diff_targets_pass
apogee_trace_diff_targets_pass.description: If all Apogee assignments pass magnitude difference between adjacent traces check.
